AVTR is the weakest overall: lowest SmartScore, weakest R:R, negative ML edge, extended-above-POC, mixed timeframe alignment, and earnings landing inside the hold window. Note also that three of the five candidates (BB, BTDR, CORZ) are Technology, so taking all three concentrates sector risk beyond what the per-ticker scores suggest.
